info.title: oversync API
info.description: HTTP API for managing oversync pipes, sinks, recipes, and sync status.

200.description: Config imported into the current control plane

500.description: Config versions could not be loaded
Credential metadata could not be loaded
Credential could not be encrypted or persisted

400.description: Request validation, credential resolution, or execution failed

200.description: Pipe definition with runtime-expanded effective queries

400.description: Pipe credentials or recipe expansion failed

500.description: Control-plane config could not be loaded

ConfigVersion.description: A saved config snapshot with version number.

DeltaDef.description: Delta detection settings for a pipe.

LinkDef.description: Cross-source entity linking rule in TOML config.

LinkStrategy.description: Matching strategy for entity linking rules.

MissedTickPolicy.description: What to do when a cycle takes longer than the polling interval.

OriginDef.description: Origin connector configuration within a pipe.

trino_url.description:
Trino URL for non-native connectors. When connector is e.g. "mssql",
queries are routed through this Trino instance.
If unset, falls back to engine-level default Trino URL.

PipeConfig.description:
A pipe is a complete data pipeline: origin → delta → transform → targets.

Pipes are the only supported runtime onboarding surface. Targets are
references to named sinks.
